productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Adi Light White Sports Shoes
description: Sleek and feminine, the Adi Light for women from adidas is specially designed for the fashion forward fitness freaks. While it makes for a great trainer, these sneakers also look and feel good when teamed with jeans or casuals.UpperSynthetic mesh upper and tongue for maximum ventilationSynthetic suede and leather overlays for added shoe structure and midfoot supportThree striped overlays on sides representing the brand's motto of perseverence and performanceLace-ups for snug Fit and durabilityLightly padded tongue and collar for comfortadidas logo embossed on tongue and behind collar to create a fashion statementLightly padded sockliner for in step comfort and snug fitMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and durabilityLightly padded footbed for impact protection and comfortOutsoleMade of non-marking durable rubber for ehanced durabilityDiamond shaped grooves for added grip and tractionPivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of forefoot without injuring the legVertical grooved box on inner arch for ergonomic comfort and support for medial footReinforced toe guard on the upper for forefoot protectionWash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
